name: BMW G14/G15/G16 M8 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M twin-turbo V8; shorter intervals than 840i; track use ~8,000 km.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: S63 M twin-turbo V8: eight spark plugs 60,000 km MFR per BMW M8 (G14/G15/G16) maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: M Steptronic 8-speed: preventive fluid ~60,000 km despite lifetime wording.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: inspect from ~80,000 km if needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW M8 (G14/G15/G16) owner's manual / M service literature — 15,000 km / 12 months oil service EU maximum; SIB B000214 where applicable to M CBS
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW M8 owner's manual — cabin microfilter per M CBS (~30,000 km with 15k oil rhythm)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW M8 owner's manual — brake fluid every 24 months; track use more frequent
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW M8 maintenance literature — engine air filters 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW M8 S63 maintenance literature — spark plug renewal 60,000 km service interval
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW M8 service literature — inspect front pads at least every 20,000 km
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW M8 service literature — inspect rear pads at least every 20,000 km
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW M8 service display / M inspection — vehicle check 30,000 km (2 × 15,000 km oil interval)
